hero.name: Keunho Kim(rootk1m)
hero.title: Security Researcher
hero.subtitle: Researching vulnerability analysis and exploit/reversing across diverse environments from an Offensive Security perspective

about.heading: About
about.description_1: Security researcher specializing in vulnerability analysis and exploit/reversing across diverse environments including IoT, Embedded, Automotive, and Mobile from an Offensive Security perspective. Beyond finding vulnerabilities, I pursue evidence-based analysis routines that include reproducibility, verification evidence, and documentation deliverables.
about.description_2: Contributed to discovering 18 CVEs through IoT smart doorbell analysis and currently researching vulnerability analysis automation using Agentic AI and LLM-based APT scenario variant generation experiments.
about.description_3: Currently studying Computer Science at Sejong University and participating in AI-based security research as an undergraduate researcher at CYAI Lab. Experienced as a Red Team intern at AUTOCRYPT Vehicle Threat Research Lab with an AutoHack 2025 award.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for security research collaboration, speaking, or opportunities.
